title: achnatherum nelsonii subsp. longiaristatum
intro: Achnatherum nelsonii subsp. longiaristatum, commonly known as the Rocky Mountain grama, is a perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of western North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Achnatherum nelsonii subsp. longiaristatum are said to include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
